page_content:
Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Electrical & Computer Engineering department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Additional Information: For students in the ECE Honors Program, a total of 6 credits combined of ENEE488 and ENEE499/499L can count toward a degree in electrical or computer engineering. For non-honors ECE students, a total of 5 credits combined of ENEE488 and ENEE499/499L can count toward a degree in electrical or computer engineering.
